posts.description_zh: Jordan Hammond 风光摄影，刚发布不久
posts.highlight: 巴厘岛摄影工作坊 · 越南梯田风光
posts.westie_prompt: A West Highland White Terrier exploring lush green Bali rice terraces at golden hour, morning mist over tropical mountains, cinematic travel photography, photorealistic, square composition, no text, no watermark.
posts.caption_en: June has been a busy one! Having recently wrapped up a 10-day workshop in Vietnam, I'm now midway through a 9-day workshop here in Bali. It's always a privilege to share these places with fellow photographers.
posts.caption_zh: 六月真的好忙！越南十天工作坊刚结束，现在又在巴厘岛进行九天工作坊。能与摄友共同探索这些地方，真是莫大的荣幸。

posts.description_zh: Tom Juenemann 自然旅行摄影
posts.highlight: 世界旅行摄影 · 极光与异域风光
posts.westie_prompt: A West Highland White Terrier standing on a snowy Norwegian hilltop with the Northern Lights glowing above, vast dark arctic landscape, dramatic atmosphere, photorealistic, square composition, no text, no watermark.
posts.caption_en: Since 2018, my Sony camera has been my passport to the world. I've chased the Northern Lights across Norway, walked through rain-soaked forests in Nicaragua, stood in Saudi Arabia's endless deserts, and explored Europe's most vibrant autumn scenery.
posts.caption_zh: 自2018年以来，相机不只是装备，更是探索世界的通行证。挪威极光、尼加拉瓜雨林、沙特沙漠、欧洲秋色……每一段旅程都截然不同。

posts.highlight: 金毛幼犬 · 全球爆款帖 14.9万赞
posts.westie_prompt: A West Highland White Terrier with bright eyes and fluffy white coat, close-up portrait, joyful expression, soft natural lighting, clean white background, photorealistic, square composition, no text, no watermark.

posts.highlight: 越南梯田与渔村摄影之旅
posts.westie_prompt: A West Highland White Terrier sitting among vibrant green Vietnam rice terraces, misty mountains in the distance, golden afternoon light, travel photography style, photorealistic, square composition, no text, no watermark.
posts.caption_en: Counting down the days until my first Vietnam workshop of the year. Just had a last minute cancellation — shoot me a message if you're keen for a last minute adventure!
posts.caption_zh: 倒数越南工作坊的日子！刚有名额取消，有兴趣来一场说走就走的冒险吗？河内街头、北部高山梯田，还有中部渔村……

posts.highlight: 巴厘岛日常 · 新晋奶爸的家门口风光
posts.westie_prompt: A West Highland White Terrier trotting through a sunlit Balinese village alley, tropical foliage, warm afternoon light filtering through palm trees, candid travel moment, photorealistic, square composition, no text, no watermark.
posts.caption_en: Becoming a father three months ago has left me with a lot less time for big trips, and has forced me to slow down and explore closer to home. Most of these were taken within 10-15 minutes of where I live, during Penny's short windows of sleep.
posts.caption_zh: 三个月前当了爸爸，大行程少了，反而慢下来探索家附近的风景。这组照片几乎都在住处15分钟内拍的，趁女儿 Penny 午睡的空档。等不及哪天带她一起去拍了！

posts.highlight: 韩国萌犬波波 · 6.6万赞爆款
posts.westie_prompt: A West Highland White Terrier being gently scooped up mid-walk, paws dangling adorably, fluffy white fur ruffled, soft park lighting, playful surprised expression, photorealistic, square composition, no text, no watermark.
posts.caption_en: While walking, the dog ate something strange and I had to carry it quickly — catching little Popo dangling mid-air was just too cute! #puppy
posts.caption_zh: 散步时小狗捡了奇怪的东西吃，紧急把它抱起来——拍到晃荡的小波波，太可爱了哈哈哈

posts.highlight: 巴厘岛摄影师33岁生日感言 · 火山日落
posts.westie_prompt: A West Highland White Terrier silhouetted against a dramatic Bali volcanic sunset, Mount Agung in the background, warm orange and purple sky, travel photography mood, photorealistic, square composition, no text, no watermark.
posts.caption_en: Another lap around the sun! When I first arrived in Bali, I never imagined I'd still be here nearly a decade later, camera in hand. Feeling extremely grateful. Here's to 33, and to sharing more of this incredible world with my daughter!
posts.caption_zh: 又绕太阳转了一圈！初到巴厘岛时从没想到会在这里待上近十年，相机不离手记录小岛日常。为33岁干杯，愿能带着女儿继续探索这个精彩的世界！

posts.description_zh: 来自话题 #dog 的爆款帖
posts.highlight: 音乐狗狗 Bandly · 搞笑才艺视频
posts.westie_prompt: A West Highland White Terrier sitting upright next to a tiny piano, alert and curious expression, ears perked up, soft studio lighting, charming portrait, photorealistic, square composition, no text, no watermark.
posts.caption_en: Bandly's little puppy has really good musical talent! #doglover #funnydog #dog
posts.caption_zh: Bandly 的小狗有非常棒的音乐天赋！

posts.highlight: 萨摩耶萌图 · 看了就想抱的蓬松白狗
posts.westie_prompt: A West Highland White Terrier extra fluffy and round like a cloud, standing on a snowy field, irresistibly huggable, soft winter light, photorealistic, square composition, no text, no watermark.
posts.caption_en: Drop a heart if you want to hug him! Follow us if you love fluffy dogs @samoyedpage
posts.caption_zh: 想抱他就扔个爱心！超蓬松的萨摩耶，看一眼就想抱进怀里

posts.highlight: 巴厘岛 Warung 市井生活 · 光影绝佳
posts.westie_prompt: A West Highland White Terrier sitting inside a colorful Indonesian Warung food stall, surrounded by vibrant local decor and warm cafe atmosphere, dappled sunlight, photorealistic, square composition, no text, no watermark.
posts.caption_en: Warungs are a staple in daily life here in Indonesia. When I'm out shooting I'll often duck into one to escape the midday sun for an iced tea. I do wonder how long they'll keep this simple, vibrant feel.
posts.caption_zh: Warung 小摊是印尼日常生活的一部分。拍摄途中常躲进去喝杯冰茶避开烈日，或下山后顺路吃点东西……不知道这种简单又鲜活的感觉还能保留多久。
